name: Apfelpfannkuchen (Apple Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, 2 teaspoons sugar, and salt.
2. Beat eggs and milk together. Gradually add the flour mixture, beating until smooth.
3. Cook apples in 1/4 cup butter until tender. Mix 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon together; toss with apples.
4. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a 6-inch diameter deep frypan. Pour in batter to a depth of about 1/4 inch.
5. When set, place 1/4 of the apples on top; cover with more batter. Fry pancake until lightly browned on both sides.
6. Keep warm. Repeat the procedure three times, using all the batter and apples. Serve immediately.
